scenes.speech: Use everything you've learned to build a real project!
scenes.title: Python Projects

scenes.speech: Find something you want to build!
scenes.title: Choosing a Project
scenes.content: Calculator, weather app, quiz game, budget tracker… start with something familiar and fun!

scenes.title: Build a Calculator
scenes.content: Accept input, perform arithmetic, display the result. Use functions to keep the code organized!

scenes.speech: A game that quizzes and scores answers!
scenes.title: Build a Quiz Game
scenes.content: Manage questions in a dictionary, pick randomly, tally scores… build a fun quiz game!
scenes.highlight: Question dict + random + score = Quiz game!

scenes.speech: Get weather info using an API!
scenes.title: Fetch Weather Data
scenes.content: Use OpenWeatherMap API and requests library to get current weather. Parse the JSON data!

scenes.title: Build a File Organizer
scenes.content: Use the os library to automatically sort files by extension. A genuinely useful tool!

scenes.speech: Automatically collect data from the web!
scenes.title: Simple Web Scraping
scenes.content: Use BeautifulSoup library to extract data from web pages automatically. Great for news or price tracking!

scenes.title: Build a GUI App with Tkinter
scenes.content: Tkinter lets you build full GUI apps with buttons, text inputs, and images — no extra install needed!

scenes.speech: Share your code with the world!
scenes.title: Share on GitHub
scenes.content: Publish your code on GitHub and get feedback. Build a portfolio for school, college, or jobs!
scenes.highlight: GitHub → publish → connect with the world!

scenes.speech: You completed a real Python project! Incredible!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
